targets.notes: Goal to reach net-zero emissions across all operations and value chain by 2030, with a 50% reduction in combined Scope 1, Scope 2 (market-based), and Scope 3 absolute emissions from a 2019 base year and use of carbon removal to neutralize remaining emissions; the company has formally committed to SBTi to validate this absolute emissions reduction target.
targets.title: Net-zero emissions across all operations and value chain by 2030
